---
title: "Mangrove Structure in Placencia"
---

Field data are maintained in [Placencia_mangroves_2025.xlsx](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/14LuCtodKnOIlNhZ7m3mE5Six7Qu6T-Sr/edit?usp=sharing) on Google Drive. A local copy is fetched automatically before each site build; you can also [download the spreadsheet directly](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/14LuCtodKnOIlNhZ7m3mE5Six7Qu6T-Sr/export?format=xlsx).

## Lagoon sectors

Click a region on the map to view its summary table. The three lagoon sectors are **upper**, **lower**, and **main creek**.

::: {#sector-map data-root="data"}
:::

::: {#sector-table-panel}
*Click a sector polygon to load its data table.*
:::
